name: agentic-registry
description: Elliot Kim's curated marketplace of Claude Code plugins — own work plus approved third-party collections.

plugins.name: repo-brain
plugins.description: Three-pillar documentation architecture (principles/product-requirements/plans) with sidecars and optional essays lane.

plugins.name: handoff-cc
plugins.description: Claude Code-tuned session handoff/pickup — write a committed pointer-style handoff (docs/handoffs/) before compact/clear, then resume in a fresh session by reading source docs first-hand and continuing without a confirmation double-check.

plugins.name: shadcn
plugins.description: shadcn component-family adapter. Two lanes: the official shadcn skill (vendored from shadcn-ui/ui) for React projects via the shadcn CLI, registries, and MCP; and a basecoat skill for shadcn-look markup without React via pinned CDN or npm+Tailwind. Ships the official shadcn MCP server (npx shadcn@latest mcp) and a shared theme-contract reference so a theme authored once serves both lanes.

plugins.name: mattpocock-skills
plugins.description: Matt Pocock's curated skill collection — TDD, systematic-debugging (diagnose), grill-me, grill-with-docs, triage, to-issues, to-prd, write-a-skill, caveman, and more. Approved 3rd-party; source of truth is upstream mattpocock/skills.
